nasb.text: Then their border went up to the west and to Maralah, it then touched Dabbesheth and reached to the brook that is before Jokneam.

esv.text: Then their boundary goes up westward and on to Mareal and touches Dabbesheth, then the brook that is east of Jokneam.

cnv.text: 他們的疆界再向西上到瑪拉拉，直達大巴設，再去到約念前面的河；

ccb.text: 从撒立向西到玛拉拉、大巴设，直到约念东边的小河；
